name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 to 8 tablespoons drippings from roasting pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475 degrees.
2. Whisk together the flour, salt, milk, butter and eggs.
3. Using a baster, drop a teaspoon or two of drippings into each cup of a muffin tin.
4. Put the muffin tin in the preheated oven.
5. When the drippings are sizzling hot, remove the tin and fill each cup 1/2 to 2/3 full with butter.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees.
7. Continue baking for 15 to 20 minutes longer, or until the popovers are puffed and brown.
8. Serve hot. Yields 12 large popovers.
